creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
edwin@FreeBSD.org writes:

> Synopsis: [patch] www/py-flexget: update to 07-Jan-2013 snapshot
>
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->lioux

Is lioux still active? Anyway, here's a new diff just before flexget
started to require py-requests>=1.0+ (ports/174646). Tested inside
83i386 poudriere jail[1] with my current config.

[1] build log: http://pastebin.com/kZMJi6EN
